# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk UX Refresh Deep Dive
- Summary: Highlight the revamped cyberpunk UI/UX in CodeBreach, linking tower-defense visuals to programming concepts and AI-assisted problem solving.
- Slug: codegrind-cyberpunk-ux-refresh

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind’s UI overhaul for Code Breach blends cyberpunk aesthetics with actionable DSA learning: dynamic towers, real-time AI guidance, and immersive feedback that ties gameplay to problem-solving.
- CTA: Explore the refreshed Code Breach experience and try a new difficulty wave using the AI assistant.
- Visual brief: Static, high-contrast cyberpunk UI screenshot showing Code Breach towers with code snippets in the background, glowing neon accents, and a panel highlighting AI-assisted hints.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
